name: Core AI Catalog
description: A source-grounded catalog of 79 Apple Core AI models with artifact provenance, benchmarks, verified terminology, readiness scores, and an MCP server for agent-native model discovery, comparison, and recommendation.

capabilities.name: Search models
capabilities.description: Filter Apple Core AI models by capability, device, license, family, source group, or modality.

capabilities.name: Get model details
capabilities.description: Retrieve full metadata for a specific model including capabilities, runtime, device support, license, provenance, and benchmarks.

capabilities.name: Compare models
capabilities.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2+ models by score, capabilities, devices, parameters, license, and benchmarks.

capabilities.name: Recommend models for task
capabilities.description: Natural-language task to model recommendation with capability resolution, device filtering, and readiness scoring.

capabilities.name: Check license status
capabilities.description: License and commercial use triage for a model, including officiality status and upstream source.

capabilities.name: Get benchmarks
capabilities.description: All benchmark measurements for a model (throughput, latency, RTF) with device, compute unit, and environment.

capabilities.name: Get artifact provenance
capabilities.description: Artifact download info: Hugging Face repo, GitHub conversion source, format, availability, and officiality.

capabilities.name: Explain Apple AI term
capabilities.description: Look up verified Apple AI/Core AI terminology with official source citation and term relations.

capabilities.name: List all capabilities
capabilities.description: All model capabilities in the catalog with model counts and benchmark coverage, sorted by frequency.

capabilities.name: List valid task keywords
capabilities.description: Lists all task keywords accepted by recommend_model, enabling agents to discover valid task inputs.

capabilities.name: Get catalog version
capabilities.description: Returns catalog version, model count, benchmark count, term count, and last_verified date.

capabilities.name: Plan transform pipeline
capabilities.description: Plan multi-hop modality transformation pipelines between Core AI models. With no arguments, returns the full transform graph. With --from, lists models that accept a given input modality. With --from and --to, computes the shortest transform pipeline from source to target modality.

from.description: Source input modality (e.g. audio, text, image)

to.description: Target output modality (e.g. image, text, audio)

json.description: Output structured JSON instead of human-readable text
